source_basis.use: approved logos, wordmarks, banners, backgrounds, and display font
investor-first positioning, audience modes, TAP, claim standards, and page implications
canonical public vocabulary and relationship labels
current live-site layout grammar, CTAs, and visual roles
current public homepage language and /info/ surface

brand_spine.category: research-backed emerging-technology software studio and market research firm
brand_spine.master_promise: Research-backed software venture formation for emerging-technology markets.
brand_spine.plain_description: CipherPlay is an emerging-technology software studio and market research firm connecting research, product thesis development, and software execution.
brand_spine.motion_tagline: From market signal to software proof.

deep_ink.role: primary dark background and motion canvas

panel_ink.role: cards, proof panels, and content bands

very_dark_blue.role: depth, section structure, and secondary surfaces

dark_blue.role: charts, proof paths, and secondary highlights

light_blue.role: primary accent, active states, investor CTAs, and signal pulses

white.role: logo variants and readable text on dark

typography.primary: Inter or clean sans-serif system font
typography.display_guidance: Use only for logo, wordmark, or very short display moments; use imported logo assets when Canva cannot reliably use the font.
avoid: long investor copy in display font

motifs.name: Circuit trace
motifs.description: A cyan line or dot travels through the symbol arms before the mark resolves.

motifs.name: Dot-field drift
motifs.description: Low-opacity ring clusters drift slowly behind content, echoing media-kit backgrounds.

motifs.name: Proof ladder build
motifs.description: Numbered proof cards enter in sequence to make diligence visible.

motifs.name: Research-to-product loop
motifs.description: Market Research, Product Thesis, and Software Proof reveal in order.

motifs.name: CTA lock-in
motifs.description: The final CTA gains a restrained cyan border or fill and then holds steady.

avoid: neon tunnels or generic blockchain grids

core_structures: audience cards for investors, partners, and customers

shape_rules.button: cyan fill for investor CTAs, restrained text links for secondary paths

creative_routes.name: Investor Diligence Signal
formula: open with a bounded strategic claim
close with a public-context-first investor CTA

creative_routes.name: Research To Product
formula: connect the signal to a product thesis or technical path
keep Full Reports as the deeper request path
creative_routes.primary_cta: Request Full Report or review Market Research

creative_routes.name: RANDAO Product Proof
formula: name RANDAO as CipherPlay-owned and operated
tie it back to research-backed execution

canva_templates.name: Investor Proof Social Card
motion: logo symbol fades in at top right
headline enters from 12px upward with opacity
CTA locks in during the last second

canva_templates.name: Research-To-Product Reel
motion: three stacked stages reveal as a vertical path
final frame resolves to wordmark and CTA

canva_templates.name: RANDAO Product Proof
motion: proof statement enters in compact card
CipherPlay ownership line remains visible before demo CTA

canva_templates.name: Partner Ecosystem Tile
motion: relationship entries fade in as labeled proof blocks

safe_factual_claims: CipherPlay is an emerging-technology software studio and market research firm.
RANDAO is a product for decentralized and verifiable randomness in blockchain and cryptographic infrastructure.
TAP means Transparency, Authenticity, and Perspicacity.
forbidden_without_owner_review: superiority claims such as best, leading, fastest, or most advanced
partnership implications stronger than documented relationship labels
investment advice or regulated financial claims

prompt_templates.canva_animation: Create an animated Canva social design using the CipherPlay Creative Production Kit. Use a dark technical canvas based on #061114 and #0D1D22. Use #37FFDE only for primary accents, proof traces, and CTAs. Use proof cards, numbered evidence paths, restrained cyan borders, and a subtle dot-field or circuit-trace motif. Locked copy: <content>. Audience mode: <Investor | Partner | Customer | Research | Product>. Reveal headline and proof blocks in sequence, then end on a stable CTA frame with the CipherPlay mark. Do not rewrite locked copy or add unsupported traction, customer, revenue, partnership, investment, or technical-superiority claims.
prompt_templates.generated_background: Create a premium dark technical background for a CipherPlay social animation. No text, no logos, no UI, no charts, no numbers, no product claims, no watermarks. Use a deep ink field, subtle cyan circuit-node clusters, restrained depth, and clean negative space for deterministic copy overlays. The feeling should be investor-ready, evidence-aware, precise, and technically literate, not hype-driven or decorative.
